import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut seen: List<String> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    mut found = false
    mut j = 0
    while j < seen.len()
      match seen.get(j)
      when Some(s)
        if s == tok
          found = true
        end
      when None
        found = found
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if not found
      mut new_seen: List<String> = []
      mut k = 0
      while k < seen.len()
        match seen.get(k)
        when Some(s)
          new_seen = list.push_str(new_seen, s)
        when None
          new_seen = new_seen
        end
        k = k + 1
      end
      new_seen = list.push_str(new_seen, tok)
      seen = new_seen
    end
  when None
    i = i
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{seen.len()}")
